feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Foreach confusion in SAC Advanced Formula
entry.content:
Hi Experts

need help with understanding Foreach in SAC Advanced formula. i was getting different output so for understanding I wrote simple foreach loop. still it surprises me with the result.

==========

MEMBERSET [d/Date] = ("202501","202502","202503")

MEMBERSET [d/Y_FUNCAREA] = ("4100","5110","7130","4250","7280")

VARIABLEMEMBER #X OF [d/Y_FUNCAREA]

FOREACH.BOOKED [d/Y_FUNCAREA]

DATA([d/Y_FUNCAREA] = #X) = RESULTLOOKUP()

ENDFOR 

 

DATA([d/Y_FUNCAREA]="9307") = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Y_FUNCAREA] = #X)

 

=============

expecting this will copy the data from  the last functional area in the loop to the target  Functional area ie 9307. 

to understand the output created story with PC and FA, the data looks like for some PC it added two FAs and for some it only considered one FA. could anyone explain why it is adding two FA for some please.

Thanks very much in Advance

entry.title: SAC SSO Dynamic User Creatinon
entry.content:
Hello experts,

 I have configured SSO to SAC (IAS as Proxy and Azure as IdP). In SAC, I enabled ‘Dynamic User Creation’ and set the "User Attribute" = email. When I try to verify my user in SAC under Step 4 against Azure AD, I can log in in SAC, but it seems that the user attributes are not being transmitted. It looks like this, see screenshot.

 

Also, I don’t see the "SAML USER MAPPING" column under Users in SAC.

Why are the user attributes not being transmitted, and how can I enable the "SAML USER MAPPING" column?

Thank you very much !!!

Best Regards

entry.title: Location/owner of private files in SAP Analytic cloud?
entry.content: How can I find the Location/owner of private files in SAP Analytic cloud? I am trying to delete some public models but there are few private files attached.

entry.title: Compare Dimension property Value, if it is blank/null - Data Action
entry.content:
I have a public dimension and i have a integer property in it,

i want to check if it is blank or null

the below doesn;t work in data action, i get error, different types cannot be compared with != operator, even if i use == operator it doesn't work


IF [d/P].[p/COST] != ""

 

@N1kh1l

entry.title: Copy Measures across hierarchies member using Advanced Formulas (Data Action)
entry.content:
Hello SAP experts, 

I'm new to Data Action in SAC Planning, and in these days I faced a requirement that can't figure it out.

The goal: Copy a the value of two measures (let's say VALUE and PERCENTAGE) whose are in the combination of specified dimensions.

Dimensions in scope are:

  • Account
  • Product
  • Plant
  • Entity
  • Owner
  • Flow

This is an example that I can use as a starting point, from which I want to copy VALUE and PERCENTAGE:

ACCOUNTPRODUCTPLANTENTITYOWNERFLOWVALUEPERCENTAGE
C010101TESTPP01ENT01SPA#100,001,2
C010102TEST-2PP01ENT02FRA#4600.008.00
C010102TESTPP01ENT02FRA#1200.003.00
C010103TESTPP03ENT03POR#560.001.40
C010101TESTPP01ENT01SPA01.010.000.00
C010101TESTPP01ENT02FRA65.010.000.00
C010101TESTPP01ENT01SPA55.010.000.00
C010102TEST-2PP01ENT02FRA55.020.000.00
C010102TESTPP01ENT02FRA55.020.000.00
C010103TESTPP03ENT03POR48.010.000.00
C010103TESTPP03ENT03POR66.010.000.00
C010103TESTPP03ENT03POR77.010.000.00
……………………

And this is the result I'd like to obtain:

ACCOUNTPRODUCTPLANTENTITYOWNERFLOWVALUEPERCENTAGE
C010101TESTPP01ENT01SPA#100,001,2
C010102TEST-2PP01ENT02FRA#46008
C010102TESTPP01ENT02FRA#12003
C010103TESTPP03ENT03POR#5601.4
C010101TESTPP01ENT01SPA01.01100,001,2
C010101TESTPP01ENT02FRA65.011200.003.00
C010101TESTPP01ENT01SPA55.01100,001,2
C010102TEST-2PP01ENT02FRA55.024600.008.00
C010102TESTPP01ENT02FRA55.021200.003.00
C010103TESTPP03ENT03POR48.01560.001.40
C010103TESTPP03ENT03POR66.01560.001.40
C010103TESTPP03ENT03POR77.01560.001.40
………………  

So I basically need to copy measures from a Flow = # to other Flow "valorized" with != # in the combination (as shown in the table above).

I've tried many approaches, this is my last attempt (with less dimensions in the combo):

 

 

MEMBERSET [d/Account] = ("C010101", "C010102", "C010103", "C010104")

VARIABLEMEMBER #Account OF [d/Account]
VARIABLEMEMBER #Flow OF [d/Flow]
VARIABLEMEMBER #Owner OF [d/Owner]
VARIABLEMEMBER #Entity OF [d/Entity]

DATA([d/Flow] = #Flow) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Flow] = "#")

// In my attempts i tried also with FOREACH but i guess it's not necessary
IF RESULTLOOKUP([d/Flow] = #Flow, [d/Measures] = "VALUE") != NULL THEN // tried also with != 0 and 1-1

DATA([d/Flow] = #Flow,
     [d/Entity] = #Entity,
     [d/Owner] = #Owner,
     [d/Measures] = "VALUE") = RESULTLOOKUP( [d/Flow] = "#",
                                             [d/Entity] = #Entity,
                                             [d/Owner] = #Owner,
                                             [d/Measures] = "VALUE")
ENDIF

IF RESULTLOOKUP([d/Flow] = #Flow, [d/Measures] = "PERCENTAGE") != NULL THEN

DATA([d/Measures] = "PERCENTAGE") = RESULTLOOKUP(
                                                 [d/Flow] = "#",
                                                 [d/Entity] = #Entity,
                                                 [d/Owner] = #Owner,
                                                 [d/Measures] = "PERCENTAGE")

ENDIF

 

 

I can write value but to all Flows, not only to the "scoped" ones.

Any guess? I'll appreciate any help.

Thank you very much.

 

Edits:

# 1 - Extended source and target samples 
# 2 - Fixed target table values

entry.title: SAP BW Date and Time dimensions as linked dimension is not supported in ODE?
entry.content:
As we all aware that Classic mode is going to deprecated. So its recommended all the Classic stories should be converted to ODE. while converting Classic to ODE few of the widgets are not loading and throwing error as 

" This widget is not compatible in optimized view mode because of the following features - SAP BW date/time dimension is not supported as a linked dimension for a blended widget".

entry.title: Assign a task to a team and then assign the task to me within the team
entry.content:
Hi,
I created a team with two members and assigned a task to the team in the calendar. After receiving the notification as a team member, can I assign the task to myself while notifying the others that I'm taking on the task?

Thanks in Advance,

Ganjos

entry.title: Publication from optimized design mode not possible with story filter.
entry.content:
Hi, 

In a SAP Analytics Cloud publication of a SAC story in optimized design mode, the story filter option is missing:

It has been available when using a story in classic design mode:

Is there an alternative solution available?

Thanks a lot! Matthias

entry.title: SAC Data Action - Calculating Allocation % is not summing to 100%
entry.content:
Hi All ,

1) I have the Kgs produced (Decimal to 7 places) measure to store the data at Farm and Product level, Material = "#" and Customer = "#" (input by users)

 

2) I have the Kgs Sold (Decimal to 7 places) measure to store the data at Farm = "#" and Product , Material and Customer level (input by users)

 

3) Price ($/Kg) entered at Farm = "#" and Product, Material and Customer level (input by users) 

 

3) Data Action Starts:- 

Step 1: - Calculates the Allocation % based on the Kg produced data (you can see that the data is not summing up to 100%

 

2) Step 2:- Calculate the Sales Qty (Trays) = Sales Qty (Kgs) / Kgs to Tray Conversion Factor 

3) Step 3:- Calculate the Sales Qty (Pallets) = Sales Qty (Kgs) / Kgs to Pallet Conversion Factor 

4) Step 4:-  Calculate the Sales Revenue ($) = Sales Qty (Kgs) * Price ($/Kg)

5) Step 5:- Bringing down the Sales Qty (Kgs/Trays/Pallets/Revenue) pushed down from Farm = # to individual Farms (Farm 1/2/3/4) based on the Allocation %s calculated in Step 1 of the data action.

the Allocated data doesn't come down to round up to the because the allocation % are not 100% .

is there any way I can have the allocation % to 100%.

entry.title: SetDimension filter on Level Based Hierarchy
entry.content:
Hello All,

I want to Dynamically pass filter on a Dimension which is a level based hierarchy.
TB_a.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("[C_c].[abc]", ["[[C_c].[abc].[Level1].&[" + v_xyz + "]"]);

C_c is the Dimension
abc is the hierarchy name
v_xyz  is the dynamic value for this which i want to pass.

but this isn't working, i have tried changing levels it still doesn't work.
i have tried other ways too, it some how doesn't work
Any clues?


@N1kh1l

entry.title: Dimensions Account SAC
entry.content:
I team, i wonder if i can preform an import of an excel data to a dimension account, and still map it?

Keep up the good work!

 

Bernardo Santos

entry.title: SAC Planning Import API Performance
entry.content:
Hello,

We are using the SAC Import API in our projects in order to integrate our calculations across all of our projects.

Which documented here: SAP Analytics Cloud REST API , It works fine for lots of rows like 100k, 250k but when it comes to 1 or 1k rows, it takes too much time to import them(20 seconds minimum). 

 The sample import process is like following:

  1. Calling the "Create job for model" API /models/{modelID} (POST)
  2. Attaching the import rows with /jobs/{jobID} (POST)
  3. Triggering the import job /jobs/{jobID}/run
  4. Calling the job status API until the job finishes /jobs/{jobID}/status

Is there any way to speed up this process?

Best Regards

entry.title: Current Date Input control missing from dynamic text menu
entry.content:
Greetings,

I have a story that uses a custom Current date input control. In the past, I have been able to include dynamic text in my story that references this input control. I can still see this dynamic text in old stories but the option to select the Custom date input control does not appear to be available when I create a new story. Did this functionality change/move? Thank you.

SAP Analytics Cloud

entry.title: Data locking automatically without manual intervention in SAC Planning on specific conditions
entry.content:
There is some requirement on Data locking automatically without manual intervention in SAC Planning World,

we have a Model-1 with 100 cost centers.

1.For First week of planning all 100 cost centers to be available for planing .

2.In second week Only specifc cost centers to be locked in Model-1 based on the cost centers available in Model-2
(Model-2 contains all valid cost centers) , we need to keep valid cost centers in separate model to update from Source every week.


Multi action either can lock or unlock the entire data based on parameter of dimension only not based on property of cost center dimension.

 

Summary is like Not able to lock specific cost centers- automation is required no manual intervention.

This is quite easy using driver based functionality in BPC world.

Any leads here greatly appreciated!

Thanks in Advance Surya Harsha

entry.title: Text alignment problems with text widgets (Update?)
entry.content:
Hi,

I saw today that on my dashboards the text in text widgets has been moved. Is there a new alignment setting in the text widget now? Was a update yesterday?

entry.title: Time Series Chart Time Hierarchy graphic problem in Sap Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

I've created a Time Series chart in Sap Analytics Cloud using a time hierarchy. The underlying model is  a hana calculation view made in Business Application Studio.

The problem appeared this month and it shows only when i switch the time hierarchy to "Month".

If the hierarchy is set to "Day", it is correct:


 

If i switch to "Month" then it appears like this:

Why is it creating two different path? 

Thanks for helping me

entry.title: What is the refund policy of PayZapp?
entry.content: If a payment is unclaimed, denied or refunded 7600-786-212 for any reason, we will return the money to your Account within 30 Days of the date you initiate payment.

entry.title: SAC Locking Unlocking using Multi Action
entry.content:
Hi All,

1) I get Actuals from BW in public. Actual version first, then I use the Forecast "Act Start Week" and Actuals End Week" to understand how many weeks of Actuals need to be copied from "public. Actual" to "public.FM_202403" via the data action.

2) Because I want to see both the Actuals and Forecast data in one line, hence both Actuals and Forecast is sharing the same intersection, I do not use the Forecast Layout here

3) I have an input layout that has Restricted measures to accept Qty and Price restricted to AD_INV_INP at Farm "#" which is the only interface available for users to input the data. i want to just lock the Actuals period on this input layout to not allow the users input at AD_INV_INP but later when they run the data action, I want it to open the Actual periods and then copy the latest Actual against AD = AD_INV_STOCK or AD_INV_STOCK_VAL.

is it possible to do so ?

entry.title: Jddj dbdjd djdjd djdjd dndnd ddbbd dndnd
entry.content: Djkd sbdjs dndndd dndn dndndd bdhd dbdb dnd

entry.title: !!QUICKEN!! Can I Talk To A Real Person At Quicken?
entry.content:
!!QUICKEN!! Can I Talk To A Real Person At Quicken?

Yes, you can talk to a real person at Quicken by calling 1-(888)-569-0146 . Follow the phone prompts to reach the support area you need and speak with a live representative.

To contact Quicken customer support, call 1-(888)-569-0146 . Their customer service team can assist with inquiries and troubleshooting related to your Quicken software.
To reach Intuit Quicken Support call (1-(888)-569-0146. Their team can assist with questions or technical issues related to Quicken software.
The Quicken support number is 1-(888)-569-0146. Call this number for assistance with Quicken .
How do I contact Quicken Desktop support?

To contact Quicken Desktop support, call 1-(888)-569-0146 . Follow the prompts to navigate to the Desktop support team and speak with a representative knowledgeable in Quicken Desktop solutions.

How do I contact Quicken desktop support?

To contact Quicken Desktop support, dial 1-(888)-569-0146 . Use the phone menu to select the Quicken Desktop option, and you will be connected to a support representative who can assist you.

How do I contact Quicken support team?

You can contact the Quicken support team by calling 1-(888)-569-0146 . Follow the prompts to get directed to the appropriate department based on your support needs.

How can I talk to a live person in Quicken?

To talk to a live person in Quicken, call 1-(888)-569-0146 . Follow the automated prompts to reach the correct department and wait to be connected to a live representative.

How do I speak to a live person at Quicken?

To speak to a live person at Quicken, dial 1-(888)-569-0146 . Navigate the phone menu to the relevant support area and stay on the line to be connected with a live agent.

How do I speak to a human at Quicken?

To speak to a human at Quicken, call 1-(888)-569-0146 . Use the phone menu to select the appropriate options and wait to be connected to a live support agent.
